title: 東京大賞典の後に・トップウマドル☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon wins the Tokyo Daishoten. Her
concert proves to be such a hit that all her fans
can't fit inside the venue, and staff need to set up
a screen outside.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the middle of the performance, the lights
suddenly dim...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And the screen lights up with a surprise video
showing messages of gratitude from all of Smart
Falcon's loving fans—starting with none other
than Symboli Rudolf.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Emotions run high. It appears the concert is going
to wrap up there with a happy ending, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Like a true Umadol, Smart Falcon requests
another chant from the crowd! Tonight, a top
Umadol is born!
